patch.value: Local test/coverage dev loop 17+min: replace per-call spawnSync CLI runner with synchronous worker-thread bridge

User escalation 2026-07-12: local suite runtime grew from <5min to 17+min. pm-7rlp (closed) removed the 1,704 init-time spawns and sharded CI coverage (CI back to 5-6min), but the LOCAL run still executes ~1,507 static runCli call sites (more at runtime via loops) through spawnSync(node dist/cli.js) — a fresh Node boot + full ESM bundle load (~210ms unloaded, multiplied under 8-way fork contention) per CLI assertion. Worst files measured: validate-command 330s, release-readiness-runtime 264s, update-command 255s, help-runtime 249s. Fix: tests/helpers/cliWorkerBridge.{ts,worker.mjs} — one persistent worker thread per vitest fork imports dist/cli/main.js ONCE and executes invocations in-process; the main thread keeps runCli's synchronous contract via Atomics.wait + receiveMessageOnPort (zero changes to 68 spec files); spawn fallback retained for cwd/stdin-input calls, worker death, timeout, and PM_TEST_CLI_RUNNER=spawn opt-out. Depends on the pm-8fxc cache reset (stale extension snapshot would otherwise break install->use tests). Evidence: help-runtime.spec 250s -> 15s (41/41).

runCli keeps its synchronous signature with zero spec-file edits; full suite passes; local test-mode wall time reduced by at least 3x from the 17+min baseline; spawn semantics preserved for cwd/input call sites and via PM_TEST_CLI_RUNNER=spawn escape hatch

value.note: worker: single dist import, env/argv/stdio patching, process.exit guard
runCli routing: bridge by default, spawn for cwd/input/opt-out

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: runCli keeps its synchronous signature with zero spec-file edits; full suite passes; local test-mode wall time reduced by at least 3x from the 17+min baseline

Sync worker bridge shipped (Atomics.wait + receiveMessageOnPort, single dist import per worker, taint-based reuse across test contexts with route-independent extension/schema taint detection, spawn fallback for cwd/stdin/timeout/worker-death). Full suite 5563/5563 green in 4m19s vitest wall (baseline 17-25+min, worst files 330s->~30s; help-runtime 250s->15s). One iteration of per-test disposal measured 9m45s before taint-based reuse landed 4m19s.

message: Bridge + evidence; product-side prerequisites pm-8fxc (fixed) and residual pm-qfdd (open)

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Local dev-loop restored: spawn tax removed via sync worker bridge; 5563/5563 green at 4m19s vs 17-25min baseline (>4x). Residual re-entrancy defect tracked as pm-qfdd.

message: Local dev-loop restored: spawn tax removed via sync worker bridge; 5563/5563 green at 4m19s vs 17-25min baseline (>4x). Residual re-entrancy defect tracked as pm-qfdd.

value.text: Coverage-mode evidence: node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (skip-build) = 5563/5563, all 100% global thresholds met, exit 0, real 4m55.7s — both modes now under 5min vs 17-25min baseline. New src lines (runPmCli entry reset + resetActiveExtensionRuntimeState) covered by the existing gate.
